response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_id : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Location
PK location_id
ATTR location_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL Passenger -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_id
